---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem would this solve?**
Describe the use case or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like NiceView to do. A sketch of the API (a factory call, a `niceview.Field(...)`
option, etc.) is very welcome.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you currently use or other approaches you thought about.
